message.content:
@startuml
title PCWS Sequences

actor Customer
participant "PCWS" as pcws
database PostgreSQL
entity Disk
agent transfer_logs.sh
box "" #LightBlue2
  participant AccountService as account_service
end box
package Datalog {
    service datalog_service
}


Customer -> pcws : request image 
pcws->account_service: check account permission 

activate pcws  
pcws <- pcws : generate image   
deactivate pcws  

pcws-->Disk: write data log    
customer <-- pcws :image   

note over disk,disk:some time later    

loop for each log     
   agent<-disk: read data log      
   activate agent       
   agent -->datalog_service: send data log        
   deactivate agent         
 end loop     

@enduml
